cards.title: Recognised by the Royal Society of Arts
cards.text: Esen Tunalı Sarı, FRSA is a Fellow of the Royal Society of Arts — an institution with over 270 years of history. Fellowship is awarded to individuals who contribute to the arts, commerce and social progress. It is not purchased. It is earned.

cards.title: Proven in Practice
cards.text: This methodology was built and tested inside SILVER & ELEGANT — an independent jewellery house that reached London Fashion Week, Wolf & Badger and Not Just A Label within eighteen months of founding, using generative AI as a core operational tool. What we offer clients is what we built for ourselves.

cards.title: Selective by Design
cards.text: We work with a small number of clients at any one time. Every engagement is bespoke. We do not offer packages or retainers. If there is no genuine fit, we will say so.
